visual-anti-patterns.notes: Purple-to-blue gradient covers the entire landing hero; sidebar labels and gallery metadata text appear below 16px; world builder shows 8+ distinct UI groups simultaneously (nav, categories, object grid, 3D viewport, AI header, AI chat, AI input, environment bar)

visual-child-friendly.notes: Playful tone with emojis, friendly AI buddy with suggestion chips, and themed environments are clearly child-oriented, though the world builder packs moderate information density and category pills are small tap targets

visual-consistency.notes: Landing, builder, and gallery share a coherent orange/purple palette, but save-after-reload shows a completely different design language (magenta Sparky header, green accent, 3-col emoji grid, different typography and button styles) — looks like a different product

visual-accessibility.notes: Selection borders visible on object tiles and theme chips, most buttons have text labels, but white text on purple gradient hero has questionable contrast, undo/redo icons lack text labels, and no evidence of responsive narrow-width layouts
